response.overview: The wisdom of hand and heart comes pouring from the presence of John Cage, caught on video by the eye of Chris Felver. Cage is at Crown Point Press in San Francisco, preparing an exhibition of his etchings. Detailing the first "happening," Cage underscores that his music is a more reflection of what is outside of himself, not within him. He reminisces about his initial encounter with the I Ching.
response.title: John Cage Talks About Cows
